task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Engineering Calculations app
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the main menu or interface of the 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the LC circuit or resonant frequency calculator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app is on a screen specifically for calculating resonant frequency or LC circuit properties.

task_completion.description: Enter the inductance value of 10 mH
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '10' is entered in the inductance (L) input field, and the unit is set to 'mH' (millihenries).

task_completion.description: Enter the capacitance value of 100 nF
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '100' is entered in the capacitance (C) input field, and the unit is set to 'nF' (nanofarads).
The app displays the calculated resonant frequency result, which should be approximately 5032.9 Hz.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated frequency to the specified result.txt file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file manager, or terminal shows the creation or content of '/sdcard/tasks/resonant_frequency_lc/result.txt' containing the calculated frequency value (around 5032.9).

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Electrical Engineering Calculations app to find the answer
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent interacting with the app's graphical user interface to input values and get the result, rather than just calculating it externally.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts (e.g., Python) to calculate the frequency
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal windows running math scripts to bypass the app requirement.

integrity.description: The agent saved the result to the correct file path
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/sdcard/tasks/resonant_frequency_lc/result.txt' must be explicitly visible in the app, text editor, or terminal used to save the final output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected resonant frequency for L=10mH and C=100nF is 5032.9 Hz. Acceptable values are within a ±2% tight tolerance (4932.2 to 5133.5 Hz) or ±5% loose tolerance (4781.2 to 5284.5 Hz). The result must be saved exactly to the path: /sdcard/tasks/resonant_frequency_lc/result.txt.
